summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Documents CRUD functionality. Backend APIs fully functional but frontend integration has data loading issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Documents table not loading/displaying data from backend

integration_issues.issue: Admin documents table shows empty despite backend having 11 documents. API returns data correctly but frontend doesn't display it.

passed_tests: Backend Documents CRUD API endpoints (POST, PUT, DELETE /api/admin/documents)
Document creation with all file types (DOC, XLS, PDF, ZIP)
Document update and partial update functionality
Admin documents page navigation and UI structure
Documents sidepage form with all required fields
Teacher documents tab showing external link icons
External link functionality for documents with URLs
success_percentage: Backend: 98% (57/58 tests passed), Frontend: 75% (structure works but data loading fails)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix documents data loading issue in admin panel. Backend API returns 11 documents correctly but frontend table shows empty. Check AdminDashboardPage.jsx documents fetching logic and ensure proper state management.
